ui.feature_1_text: Full i18n support with automatic fallback. Each page renders in every language you configure.
ui.feature_2_text: Built entirely on Bun's native APIs. No bundlers, no build tools, no npm install needed for the core.
ui.feature_3_text: Use shared layouts, components, and per-route translations. Language-variant templates for full control.
ui.welcome_text: A blazing-fast multi-language static site built with Bun and .ree templates.
ui.starwars_title: Birth Years of Star Wars Characters
